components.name: button

components.description: Text input field with label and error state support.

components.description: Accessible form label primitive.

components.description: Toggle switch built on Base UI Switch primitive.

components.description: Custom select built entirely on Base UI Select — no native element.

components.description: Floating popover built on Base UI Popover.

components.description: Context/dropdown menu built on Base UI Menu primitive.

components.name: command
components.description: Command palette with search, built on Base UI primitives.

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tab navigation built on Base UI Tabs.

components.description: Collapsible accordion built on Base UI Accordion.

components.name: table
components.description: Styled table primitives for data display.

components.name: badge
components.description: Status badge with variant support.

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Breadcrumb navigation with separator support.

components.name: toast
components.description: Toast notifications via Base UI Toast (portal-based).

components.description: Visual divider, horizontal or vertical.

components.description: Loading skeleton placeholder.

components.description: User avatar with image, fallback initials, and optional status indicator.

components.description: Single collapsible panel controlled by a trigger button.

components.description: Empty state block with icon, title, description, and action.
